content: Run complete testing gate - Oracle Harness, Unit Tests, Integration Tests
Take stock assessment of current progress
Conduct mandatory code audit using zen mcp tools
Identify next sprint objectives based on assessment
Implement GLM (Generalized Linear Models) core structure
Develop family and link function implementations
Implement IRLS (Iteratively Reweighted Least Squares) algorithm
Create GLM oracle tests vs R's glm() function
Establish GLM benchmarking (target ≥5x faster than R)
